executives.name: Patrick Lord
executives.background: Dr. Lord has been our Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since September 2023. He previously served as Executive Vice President, Customer Support Business Group and Global Operations from 2020 to 2023, and as Senior Vice President and General Manager of various business units since joining Lam in 2012.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President & General Manager, CMP Business Unit

executives.name: Richard Hill
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Novellus Systems. Former Chairman of Marvell (2016-2021).

executives.name: Timothy Archer
executives.background: Mr. Archer has been our President and Chief Executive Officer since December 2018. He joined Lam in 2012 in connection with the acquisition of Novellus Systems, Inc., where he served as Chief Operating Officer. He previously served as our President and Chief Operating Officer from January 2018 to December 2018 and as our Chief Operating Officer from June 2012 to January 2018.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Operating Officer; Senior Director-Technology (Novellus Systems Japan)

board_of_directors.name: Richard Hill
